tasks.title: Create src/lib/db.ts with SQLite schema
tasks.description: Create src/lib/db.ts using better-sqlite3. Auto-create data/ directory if missing. Initialize tables: users (id TEXT PK, username TEXT UNIQUE, password_hash TEXT, is_admin INTEGER DEFAULT 0, created_at TEXT), tournaments (id TEXT PK, name TEXT, year INTEGER, lock_time_groups TEXT, lock_time_knockout TEXT, bracket_data TEXT, results_data TEXT), predictions (id TEXT PK, user_id TEXT, tournament_id TEXT, bracket_name TEXT, group_predictions TEXT, third_place_picks TEXT, knockout_picks TEXT, tiebreaker INTEGER, submitted_at TEXT), groups (id TEXT PK, name TEXT, invite_code TEXT UNIQUE, created_by TEXT, created_at TEXT, scoring_settings TEXT, max_brackets INTEGER, submissions_locked INTEGER DEFAULT 0), group_members (group_id TEXT, prediction_id TEXT, PRIMARY KEY(group_id, prediction_id)), messages (id TEXT PK, group_id TEXT, user_id TEXT, username TEXT, message TEXT, created_at TEXT). Export getDb(). DB at data/worldcup.db.

tasks.title: Create src/lib/auth.ts with JWT, hashing, getAuthUser
tasks.description: Create src/lib/auth.ts: hashPassword, verifyPassword (bcryptjs), signToken, verifyToken (jsonwebtoken, secret from process.env.JWT_SECRET with 'dev-secret' fallback), getAuthUser(request) that reads 'token' cookie, verifies, returns {userId, username, isAdmin} or null.

tasks.title: Create auth API - POST register/login
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/auth/route.ts POST handler. Accepts {action, username, password}. register: validate, hash, insert user with uuid, return JWT in httpOnly cookie + {ok, user}. login: find user, verify password, return JWT cookie + {ok, user}.

tasks.title: Create auth API - GET session, DELETE logout
tasks.description: Add GET handler to auth route: read token via getAuthUser, return {ok, user} or {ok:false, user:null}. Add DELETE handler: clear token cookie with max-age=0.

tasks.title: Create useAuth hook and AuthProvider
tasks.description: Create src/hooks/useAuth.tsx. AuthProvider context, on mount GET /api/auth for session. Expose: user, loading, login(), register(), logout(). Export useAuth() hook.

tasks.title: Create ThemeRegistry, useThemeMode, globals.css
tasks.description: Create src/components/common/ThemeRegistry.tsx (MUI ThemeProvider + Emotion cache, dark/light). Create src/hooks/useThemeMode.tsx (localStorage, default dark). Create src/app/globals.css (resets). Soccer palette: primary green #2e7d32, secondary gold #ffc107.

tasks.title: Wire providers into layout.tsx
tasks.description: Update src/app/layout.tsx: import globals.css, wrap children in ThemeRegistry + AuthProvider via client wrapper component. Verify build passes.

tasks.title: Create AuthForm component
tasks.description: Create src/components/auth/AuthForm.tsx. MUI Card, login/register toggle, username+password fields, submit button, error Alert, loading state. Uses useAuth().

tasks.title: Create Navbar and add to layout
tasks.description: Create src/components/common/Navbar.tsx. MUI AppBar: title linking /, nav links (Predictions, Leaderboard, Groups), Admin if is_admin, theme toggle, auth status. Add to layout.tsx.

tasks.title: Create CountdownTimer component
tasks.description: Create src/components/common/CountdownTimer.tsx. Props: targetDate (ISO), label. Shows days/hours/min/sec, updates every second, 'Locked' when past. Cleanup on unmount.

tasks.title: Create tournament GET API
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/tournaments/route.ts. GET returns most recent tournament by year, parsing bracket_data and results_data from JSON strings. Return {ok, tournament} or {ok, tournament:null}.

tasks.title: Create home page with countdown and auth
tasks.description: Update src/app/page.tsx as 'use client'. Fetch tournament from GET /api/tournaments. Show name, year, CountdownTimer to lock_time_groups. Welcome+link to /bracket if logged in, AuthForm if not. 'No tournament' message if none.

tasks.title: Create bracketData utilities and seed data
tasks.description: Create src/lib/bracketData.ts. Functions: parseBracketData, getTeamByName, getGroupByName, getTeamSeed, getTeamRanking. Export WORLD_CUP_2026_DATA with 12 groups of 4 teams using real team names, FIFA rankings, correct pot assignments.

tasks.title: Add result types to index.ts
tasks.description: Add to src/types/index.ts: GroupStageResults {groupResults: Array<{groupName:string, order:[string,string,string,string]}>, advancingThirdPlace: string[]}. KnockoutResults = Record<string,string>. TournamentResults {groupStage?: GroupStageResults, knockout?: KnockoutResults, knockoutBracket?: KnockoutMatchup[]}.

tasks.title: Create admin API - POST create tournament
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/admin/route.ts. POST: verify admin via getAuthUser, accept {name, year, lock_time_groups, lock_time_knockout, bracket_data}, insert with uuid, return {ok, tournament}. 403 if not admin.

tasks.title: Create admin page - tournament creation
tasks.description: Create src/app/admin/page.tsx 'use client'. Admin-only. Show existing tournament. Create form: name, year, lock times. Button to use WORLD_CUP_2026_DATA. Submit calls POST /api/admin.

tasks.title: Add seed test tournament button to admin
tasks.description: Add 'Seed Test Tournament' button to admin page using WORLD_CUP_2026_DATA, lock_time_groups=2026-06-11, lock_time_knockout=2026-06-30. Only show if no tournament exists.

tasks.title: Create group stage scoring function
tasks.description: Create src/lib/scoring.ts. scoreGroupStage(predictions, thirdPlacePicks, results: GroupStageResults, bracketData, settings): per-team advance_correct, exact_position, upset_bonus (prediction-gated, capped). Per-group advancement_correct_bonus (independent), perfect_order_bonus (independent). Return {total, perGroup}.

tasks.title: Create knockout scoring function
tasks.description: Add scoreKnockout(picks, results: KnockoutResults, bracketData, settings) to scoring.ts. Base points per round, upset bonus = floor(rankDiff/modulus)*multiplier. Champion bonus. Add scoreTotalPrediction() combining both. Return {total, perRound}.

tasks.title: Create scoring unit tests
tasks.description: Add vitest to devDeps, create vitest.config.ts. Create tests/scoring.test.ts testing all edge cases: advance_correct scenarios, exact_position, upset bonus capping, 3rd-place interaction, independent group bonuses, knockout formula with modulus, champion bonus, integration test.

tasks.title: Create predictions API - save/load group predictions
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/picks/route.ts. GET: return user prediction for active tournament. POST {action:'save_groups', bracket_name, group_predictions, third_place_picks}: upsert prediction. Check lock_time_groups, reject if past. Return {ok, prediction}.

tasks.title: Create predictions API - save/load knockout picks
tasks.description: Add to picks route: POST {action:'save_knockout', knockout_picks, tiebreaker}: update prediction with knockout data. Check lock_time_knockout. Only allow if group results exist. GET returns knockout_picks+tiebreaker too.

tasks.title: Create GroupPrediction component
tasks.description: Create src/components/bracket/GroupPrediction.tsx. MUI Card showing one group of 4 teams. Each row: position (1-4), flag placeholder, name, pot seed Chip, FIFA ranking. Up/down arrows to reorder. onChange(groupName, newOrder). disabled prop.

tasks.title: Create ThirdPlacePicker component
tasks.description: Create src/components/bracket/ThirdPlacePicker.tsx. Shows 12 third-place teams as toggleable Chips. User selects exactly 8. Count display. onChange(selected). disabled prop.

tasks.title: Create group stage predictions page
tasks.description: Create src/app/bracket/page.tsx 'use client'. Fetch tournament + predictions. 12 groups in responsive grid using GroupPrediction. ThirdPlacePicker below. Save button. CountdownTimer. Disable if locked/not logged in.

tasks.title: Create knockout bracket generation
tasks.description: Create src/lib/knockoutBracket.ts. generateKnockoutBracket(groupResults, bracketData) returns KnockoutMatchup[] for 31 matches. FIFA R32 mapping for 48-team format. IDs like R32-1, R16-3, QF-2, SF-1, 3RD, FINAL. Export getNextMatchupId() for cascade.

tasks.title: Create admin API - save group stage results
tasks.description: Add PUT to admin route: {action:'save_group_results', groupResults, advancingThirdPlace}. Verify admin. Validate. Generate knockout bracket. Save to tournament.results_data.

tasks.title: Create admin page - group results entry UI
tasks.description: Extend admin page: Group Stage Results section. Per-group finishing order selection. 3rd-place advancement checkboxes. Submit calls PUT /api/admin. Only visible when tournament exists.

tasks.title: Create Matchup component
tasks.description: Create src/components/bracket/Matchup.tsx. Two team slots with flag, name, ranking. Click to pick winner. Read-only mode for results. Props: matchup, userPick, onPick callback, readOnly, disabled.

tasks.title: Create bracketUtils with cascade clearing
tasks.description: Create src/lib/bracketUtils.ts. cascadeClear(picks, changedMatchupId, matchups): clear downstream picks depending on changed team. getMatchupsByRound(matchups). Pattern from March Madness.

tasks.title: Create KnockoutBracket desktop component
tasks.description: Create src/components/bracket/KnockoutBracket.tsx. Full R32-to-Final bracket with Matchup components, CSS connector lines. Props: matchups, picks, onPick, readOnly. Uses cascadeClear on pick change. Desktop layout: rounds left-to-right.

tasks.title: Create knockout predictions page
tasks.description: Create src/app/bracket/knockout/page.tsx 'use client'. Check group results exist. Fetch bracket + picks. KnockoutBracket component. Tiebreaker input. Save button. CountdownTimer to lock_time_knockout. Disable if locked.

tasks.title: Create MobileBracket with round tabs
tasks.description: Create src/components/bracket/MobileBracket.tsx for <768px. MUI Tabs per round. Same props as KnockoutBracket. Add width detection to auto-switch between Mobile and Desktop layouts.

tasks.title: Create admin API - save knockout results
tasks.description: Add to admin PUT: action 'save_knockout_results' with {knockoutResults}. Merge into results_data. Admin enters results match-by-match as tournament progresses.

tasks.title: Create admin page - knockout results entry
tasks.description: Extend admin page: Knockout Results section. KnockoutBracket in admin mode (clicks set results). Save button. Only visible when group results exist.

tasks.title: Create groups API
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/groups/route.ts. GET: list user groups with member counts. POST create (name, scoring_settings, max_brackets, auto-gen invite_code). POST join (invite_code, prediction_id). POST leave (group_id). All require auth.

tasks.title: Create ScoringEditor component
tasks.description: Create src/components/common/ScoringEditor.tsx. Group stage inputs: advanceCorrect, exactPosition, upsetBonusPerPlace, advancementCorrectBonus, perfectOrderBonus. Knockout: 6 pointsPerRound, 6 upsetMultiplierPerRound, upsetModulus, championBonus. Pre-fill DEFAULT_SCORING. onChange(ScoringSettings).

tasks.title: Create groups page UI
tasks.description: Create src/app/groups/page.tsx 'use client'. List groups as Cards (name, members, invite code+copy). Create dialog with ScoringEditor. Join dialog with code input. Group cards link to /leaderboard?group=ID.

tasks.title: Create leaderboard API
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/leaderboard/route.ts. GET with group_id. Fetch scoring_settings, predictions, results. Score each prediction. Return sorted LeaderboardEntry[] by totalScore desc, tiebreaker secondary.

tasks.title: Create ScoringBreakdownDialog
tasks.description: Create src/components/common/ScoringBreakdownDialog.tsx. MUI Dialog, two tabs: Group Stage (per-group per-team breakdown) and Knockout (per-round per-match breakdown). Totals. Props: prediction, results, settings, bracketData, open, onClose.

tasks.title: Create leaderboard page
tasks.description: Create src/app/leaderboard/page.tsx 'use client'. Group selector. Sortable MUI Table: rank, username, bracket, group score, knockout score, total, tiebreaker. Click score opens ScoringBreakdownDialog. Highlight current user.

tasks.title: Create compare predictions page
tasks.description: Create src/app/compare/page.tsx 'use client'. Group selector, multi-select up to 4 users. Group predictions side-by-side with colored indicators. Knockout overlay with colored dots per user.

tasks.title: Create Who Picked Whom page
tasks.description: Create src/app/whopicked/page.tsx 'use client'. Group selector. Per-group table of who predicted what. Per-knockout-match pick distribution. Highlight correct picks. Add GET /api/picks?group_id=X to picks route.

tasks.title: Create stats dashboard
tasks.description: Create src/app/stats/page.tsx 'use client'. Group selector. Most popular champion, most contrarian picks, group accuracy %, most chalk vs upset-heavy brackets.

tasks.title: Create What-If simulator
tasks.description: Create src/app/simulate/page.tsx 'use client'. KnockoutBracket in sim mode (clicks set hypothetical results). Sidebar leaderboard recalculates live. Group selector.

tasks.title: Create Monte Carlo simulation
tasks.description: Create src/lib/monteCarloWorker.ts (web worker, 1000 sims, FIFA ranking win probs). src/hooks/useMonteCarlo.ts. Add results table to simulator page.

tasks.title: Create group chat
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/groups/messages/route.ts (GET/POST). Create src/components/common/GroupChat.tsx (message list, input, send, poll 10s). Add to leaderboard page as collapsible panel.

tasks.title: Create pick reminder banner
tasks.description: Create src/components/common/PickReminderBanner.tsx. MUI Alert when within 24h of lock and predictions incomplete. Dismissible. Add to layout.tsx.

tasks.title: Create shareable public bracket links
tasks.description: Create src/app/bracket/[username]/page.tsx. Public read-only view, no auth. Shows group predictions + knockout bracket. Share button copies URL.

tasks.title: Create print-friendly bracket view
tasks.description: Add @media print CSS to globals.css. Print button on bracket pages. Export-as-image via html2canvas.

tasks.title: Fix home page: show AuthForm when not logged in regardless of tournament state
tasks.description: Bug: The home page only shows AuthForm when a tournament exists AND user is not logged in. If no tournament exists, it shows 'No tournament yet' with no way to log in. Fix src/app/page.tsx: check user auth FIRST. If not logged in, show the title, subtitle, and AuthForm regardless of tournament state. Only show tournament info, countdown, and navigation after the user is authenticated. Also add an Admin Panel button for admin users when logged in. This matches the March Madness pattern where unauthenticated users always see the login form.

tasks.title: Fix WORLD_CUP_2026_DATA with real draw results and FIFA rankings
tasks.description: The current WORLD_CUP_2026_DATA in src/lib/bracketData.ts has incorrect placeholder groups. Replace with the actual 2026 FIFA World Cup draw results: Group A: Mexico(15,pot1), South Africa(61,pot4), South Korea(22,pot2), Czechia(44,pot3). Group B: Canada(27,pot1), Bosnia and Herzegovina(71,pot4), Qatar(51,pot3), Switzerland(17,pot2). Group C: Brazil(5,pot1), Morocco(11,pot2), Haiti(84,pot4), Scotland(36,pot3). Group D: USA(14,pot1), Paraguay(39,pot3), Australia(26,pot2), Turkiye(25,pot4). Group E: Germany(9,pot1), Curacao(82,pot4), Ivory Coast(42,pot3), Ecuador(23,pot2). Group F: Netherlands(7,pot1), Japan(18,pot2), Sweden(43,pot3), Tunisia(40,pot4). Group G: Belgium(8,pot1), Egypt(34,pot2), Iran(20,pot3), New Zealand(86,pot4). Group H: Spain(1,pot1), Cape Verde(68,pot4), Saudi Arabia(60,pot3), Uruguay(16,pot2). Group I: France(3,pot1), Senegal(19,pot2), Norway(29,pot3), Iraq(58,pot4). Group J: Argentina(2,pot1), Algeria(35,pot2), Austria(24,pot3), Jordan(66,pot4). Group K: Portugal(6,pot1), DR Congo(56,pot4), Uzbekistan(50,pot3), Colombia(13,pot2). Group L: England(4,pot1), Croatia(10,pot2), Ghana(72,pot3), Panama(30,pot4). Pot assignments determine groupSeed: pot1=seed1, pot2=seed2, pot3=seed3, pot4=seed4. Also update the seeded tournament in the database if one exists with empty bracket_data.

tasks.title: Fix /bracket page client-side crash
tasks.description: Bug: The /bracket page crashes with 'Application error: a client-side exception has occurred'. This was confirmed via Nova Act browser testing. Debug by checking the browser console error. Likely causes: accessing a property on null/undefined tournament data, bracket_data being an empty object {} instead of having groups array, or a type mismatch. The tournament in the DB was seeded with empty bracket_data '{}' — the page needs to handle this gracefully (show a message like 'Tournament data not yet available') OR the bracket_data needs to be populated with WORLD_CUP_2026_DATA. Fix the crash and verify with a Nova Act test against https://worldcup.edgecdec.com/bracket.

tasks.title: Add drag-and-drop reordering to GroupPrediction component
tasks.description: The GroupPrediction component currently uses up/down arrow buttons to reorder teams. Add drag-and-drop support so users can drag teams to reorder them within a group. Use HTML5 drag-and-drop API (no extra dependencies) or a lightweight approach with onDragStart/onDragOver/onDrop on each team row. Keep the up/down arrows as a fallback for accessibility. Each team row should show a drag handle icon (DragIndicator from MUI icons) on the left. While dragging, show a visual indicator of where the team will be dropped. Touch support is important for mobile — ensure drag works on touch devices or fall back to the arrow buttons on mobile. Test with Nova Act on https://worldcup.edgecdec.com/bracket to verify drag reordering works.

tasks.title: Add ESPN team IDs to Team type and WORLD_CUP_2026_DATA
tasks.description: Add espnId: number field to the Team interface in src/types/index.ts (required, not optional). Update WORLD_CUP_2026_DATA in src/lib/bracketData.ts with verified ESPN team IDs for all 48 teams. Correct IDs from ESPN standings API: Mexico=203, Czechia=450, South Korea=451, South Africa=467, Canada=206, Bosnia and Herzegovina=452, Switzerland=475, Qatar=4398, Brazil=205, Scotland=580, Haiti=2654, Morocco=2869, Paraguay=210, Turkiye=465, Australia=628, USA=660, Ecuador=209, Germany=481, Ivory Coast=4789, Curacao=11678, Netherlands=449, Sweden=466, Japan=627, Tunisia=659, Belgium=459, Iran=469, Egypt=2620, New Zealand=2666, Spain=164, Uruguay=212, Saudi Arabia=655, Cape Verde=2597, Norway=464, France=478, Senegal=654, Iraq=4375, Argentina=202, Austria=474, Algeria=624, Jordan=2917, Colombia=208, Portugal=482, Uzbekistan=2570, DR Congo=2850, England=448, Croatia=477, Panama=2659, Ghana=4469. ESPN IDs should be the PRIMARY key for matching teams across ESPN sync, scoring, and all lookups — never rely on name matching. Add a getTeamByEspnId(data, espnId) utility to bracketData.ts. Update the tournament in the DB with bracket_data including espnIds.

tasks.title: Create ESPN live scores sync service
tasks.description: Create src/lib/espnSync.ts. Fetch live World Cup scores from ESPN API: https://site.api.espn.com/apis/site/v2/sports/soccer/fifa.world/scoreboard. Parse each event into a LiveGame object: extract team names (match by ESPN team ID to our team names using bracketData), scores, match status (scheduled/in/post), clock, period, detail text. Export fetchLiveScores(bracketData): Promise<LiveGame[]>. Also export fetchGroupStandings() that hits https://site.api.espn.com/apis/v2/sports/soccer/fifa.world/standings and returns current group tables with points, wins, draws, losses, GD for each team. Match ESPN team IDs to our team names.

tasks.title: Create useLiveScores hook and LiveScores component
tasks.description: Create src/hooks/useLiveScores.ts — hook that calls fetchLiveScores() every 30 seconds when there are active matches, returns {games: LiveGame[], loading: boolean}. Only poll when tournament is in progress (between start and end dates). Create src/components/bracket/LiveScores.tsx — compact card grid showing in-progress and recent match scores. Each card shows team flags/names, score, match status/clock. Add LiveScores to the home page when matches are in progress. Each live score card should link to the ESPN match page (https://www.espn.com/soccer/match/_/gameId/{espnGameId}) so users can click through for full match details, lineups, and commentary.

tasks.title: Create live group standings component with prediction comparison
tasks.description: Create src/components/bracket/GroupStandings.tsx. Fetches current group standings from ESPN via fetchGroupStandings(). For each group, shows a table with: position, team name, points, W/D/L, GD. Next to the live standings, show the user's predicted order for that group with colored indicators: green checkmark if team is currently in the position the user predicted, yellow arrow if team is in the right half (top 2 / bottom 2) but wrong exact position, red X if completely wrong. This gives users real-time feedback on how their group predictions are tracking. Add a 'Live Standings' tab or section to the /bracket page that appears once the tournament has started.

tasks.title: Create auto-sync API for group stage results from ESPN
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/auto-sync/route.ts. GET endpoint (admin only or cron-triggered) that fetches ESPN group standings, determines if all group stage matches are complete (all teams played 3 games), and if so, auto-populates the tournament's group stage results from ESPN data. Maps ESPN standings order to our GroupStageResults format. Determines which 3rd-place teams advance based on FIFA's best-third-place rules (points, GD, goals scored). Triggers knockout bracket generation. This automates what the admin would otherwise do manually. Add a 'Sync from ESPN' button on the admin page that calls this endpoint.

tasks.title: Create auto-join 'Everyone' group with default scoring
tasks.description: Add an 'Everyone' group that all users automatically belong to, following the March Madness pattern. In src/lib/db.ts: add ensureEveryoneGroup() that creates a group with id='everyone', name='Everyone', invite_code='everyone', DEFAULT_SCORING settings if it doesn't exist. Call it during DB init. Add joinEveryoneGroup(db, userId) that inserts the user into group_members for the everyone group. Add autoAssignPredictionToEveryone(db, predictionId) that adds the prediction to group_members for everyone. Wire these in: (1) call joinEveryoneGroup in the register handler in auth route after creating the user, (2) call autoAssignPredictionToEveryone in the picks route after saving/creating a prediction. The Everyone group should appear in every user's group list and its leaderboard shows all players. It cannot be left or deleted. On the groups page, show it at the top with a special indicator (e.g. globe icon).

tasks.title: Create join-via-link page at /join/[code]
tasks.description: Create src/app/join/[code]/page.tsx. When a user visits /join/ABC123, the page looks up the group by invite_code. If not logged in, show AuthForm with a message like 'Log in or register to join [Group Name]'. After login/register, auto-join the group. If already logged in, show group name and a 'Join Group' button that calls POST /api/groups with action 'join'. After joining, redirect to /leaderboard?group=ID. If code is invalid, show error. Also update the groups page share button to copy the full URL (https://worldcup.edgecdec.com/join/CODE) instead of just the code. This is the primary way users will invite friends — share a link, friend clicks it, registers, and is automatically in the group.

tasks.title: Add edit scoring settings for group admins on groups page
tasks.description: On the groups page, group creators (created_by matches current user) should see a Settings/Edit icon button on their group card. Clicking it opens a dialog with the ScoringEditor pre-filled with the group's current scoring_settings. Save button calls a new PUT /api/groups endpoint that updates scoring_settings for the group (verify the user is the group creator). Only allow editing before the tournament locks (lock_time_groups). The Everyone group should also be editable by its admin (edgecdec). Show the current scoring summary on each group card (e.g. 'Knockout: 3/5/8/13/13/21' as a compact chip or tooltip) so users can see at a glance what scoring their group uses.

tasks.title: Fix: auto-join creator to group on creation
tasks.description: Bug: When a user creates a group, they are not added to group_members, so the group doesn't appear in their group list. Fix the 'create' action in src/app/api/groups/route.ts: after inserting the group, find the user's prediction (SELECT id FROM predictions WHERE user_id = ?) and if it exists, INSERT into group_members (group_id, prediction_id). If the user has no prediction yet, still create the group but log that they'll be added when they create a prediction. Also fix existing orphaned groups: the groups 'Testing', 'Test', 'Test2' created by edgecdec need their prediction added to group_members. Add a migration in db.ts initDb() that auto-assigns creators to their own groups if not already members.

tasks.title: Highlight advancing/eliminated teams on group predictions page
tasks.description: On the /bracket group predictions page, visually indicate which teams the user is predicting to advance vs not advance. In each GroupPrediction card: teams predicted 1st or 2nd get a subtle green background (theme: success.main with low alpha). Teams predicted 3rd that are picked as one of the 8 advancing third-place teams also get green. Teams predicted 3rd but NOT picked to advance get a neutral/amber background. Teams predicted 4th get a subtle red/dimmed background (theme: error.main with low alpha). This makes it immediately clear at a glance which teams the user expects to go through. The ThirdPlacePicker selection should dynamically update the 3rd-place team colors in the group cards (green if selected, amber if not). Use MUI theme tokens for colors — no hardcoded hex.

tasks.title: Add correct/incorrect color coding to bracket picks after results
tasks.description: On the knockout bracket view and group predictions page, after results are entered, color-code the user's picks: green background/border for correct picks, red/dimmed for incorrect picks. In KnockoutBracket/Matchup: if a result exists for a matchup and the user picked the correct winner, highlight their pick in green (success.main). If they picked wrong, show it in red (error.main) with the correct winner indicated. In GroupPrediction: after group results exist, show green for teams in the correct position, amber for correct half but wrong position, red for completely wrong. Apply to both the user's own bracket view and the public/shared bracket view.

tasks.title: Add max possible remaining score to leaderboard
tasks.description: Calculate and display max possible remaining score on the leaderboard, designed for both tournament phases. Create src/lib/maxPossible.ts. DURING GROUP STAGE: max = current group points earned so far + max possible from remaining unplayed group matches (assume user gets every remaining team position correct) + theoretical max knockout score (all picks correct with max upset bonuses). DURING KNOCKOUT: max = final locked group score + current knockout points + remaining knockout potential (assume all remaining picks are correct with upset bonuses). Display as 'Max' column on leaderboard. Add 'Eliminated' indicator (skull icon) when user's max < leader's current score. Add 'Bracket Busted' indicator (💀) specifically when user's predicted champion has been knocked out of the tournament. Compute client-side with requestIdleCallback to avoid blocking. Show spinner while computing.

tasks.title: Add autofill buttons (Chalk/Random/Smart) for predictions
tasks.description: Add autofill functionality to both the group stage and knockout prediction pages. Create src/lib/autofill.ts with three strategies: (1) Chalk — higher-ranked team (lower FIFA ranking number) always wins/finishes higher. Groups ordered by FIFA ranking, knockout picks favor the better-ranked team. (2) Random — random order for groups, coin flip for knockout. (3) Smart — weighted by FIFA ranking difference (e.g. 70% chance the better team wins, scaled by ranking gap). Add autofill buttons (Chalk/Random/Smart) to the bracket page and knockout page. Only fill empty slots — don't overwrite existing picks. Show a confirmation dialog before applying. For groups, autofill sets the order. For knockout, autofill picks winners for unfilled matchups. For 3rd-place picks, chalk/smart pick the 8 highest-ranked 3rd-place teams.

tasks.title: Add country flags everywhere teams are displayed
tasks.description: Add country flag images next to every team name throughout the app. Use flag CDN (e.g. https://flagcdn.com/w40/{country-code}.png or emoji flags). Add a countryCode field to the Team interface (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 lowercase, e.g. 'mx' for Mexico, 'br' for Brazil, 'us' for USA). Update WORLD_CUP_2026_DATA with correct country codes for all 48 teams. Create src/components/common/TeamFlag.tsx — a small reusable component that renders a flag image (20x15px or similar) given a country code. Use it in: GroupPrediction (next to each team name), ThirdPlacePicker (next to each chip), Matchup (next to each team), KnockoutBracket, leaderboard pick breakdowns, compare page, who-picked-whom, and anywhere else a team name appears. Fall back to emoji flag if image fails to load.

tasks.title: Simple Mode: create step-by-step group predictions flow
tasks.description: Create src/components/bracket/SimpleMode.tsx — full-screen modal overlay for guided predictions. For group stage: show one group at a time with 4 teams displayed as large tappable cards. User taps teams in order (1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th) to set their predicted finish. After ordering a group, auto-advance to next group. Progress bar shows 'Group 3 of 12'. After all 12 groups, show the ThirdPlacePicker (select 8 advancing). Add 'Fill Step-by-Step' button on the /bracket page that launches SimpleMode. Exit button returns to normal view with picks preserved.

tasks.title: Simple Mode: create step-by-step knockout predictions flow
tasks.description: Extend SimpleMode for knockout bracket. Show one matchup at a time: two large team cards (flag, name, FIFA ranking) side by side. Tap to pick winner. Auto-advance to next matchup. Progress bar shows 'Match 8 of 31'. Games flow in bracket order (R32 first, then R16 as they become available, etc). Back button to revisit previous pick. If changing a pick triggers cascade clearing, show a warning. After all 31 picks, prompt for tiebreaker (total goals in Final). Review screen showing mini bracket summary, then Save button. Add 'Fill Step-by-Step' button on /bracket/knockout page.

tasks.title: Simple Mode: mobile styling and touch optimization
tasks.description: Ensure SimpleMode is fully optimized for mobile. Team cards should be large touch targets (min 48px height). Swipe gestures: swipe left to skip, swipe right to go back. Progress bar and navigation buttons are thumb-friendly at bottom of screen. Matchup cards stack vertically on narrow screens. Flag images are prominent. Animations: brief highlight (300ms) on pick before advancing. The entire flow should feel like a native app quiz/survey experience.

tasks.title: Add leaderboard emoji indicators (🔥 streak, 😱 contrarian pick)
tasks.description: Add emoji indicators to leaderboard entries. During GROUP STAGE: 🎯N = number of perfect groups (all 4 positions exactly correct in a group). Show as '🎯3' if user nailed 3 groups perfectly. During KNOCKOUT: 🔥N = hot streak (N consecutive correct knockout picks in a row). 😱N = number of contrarian picks that hit — shown when a user correctly predicted N things that <10% of the group predicted. During group stage: predicting a specific team in a specific position that <10% of group members also predicted (e.g. only 2 of 30 people predicted Saudi Arabia 1st, and it happened). During knockouts: predicting a team to reach a certain round that <10% picked (e.g. only 3 people had Senegal in the QF). Calculate percentages from all predictions in the group. Show emojis as small badges next to the username on the leaderboard. Tooltip on hover explains what the indicator means.

tasks.title: Allow group admins to remove members from their group
tasks.description: Add a member management section to each group on the groups page (only visible to the group creator). Show list of members with a remove button (X icon) next to each. Clicking remove calls DELETE /api/groups with {action: 'remove_member', group_id, prediction_id}. API verifies the requester is the group creator before allowing removal. Cannot remove from the Everyone group. Show confirmation dialog before removing.

tasks.title: Site admin: add any user to any group from admin page
tasks.description: Add a 'Group Management' section to the /admin page (site admin only). Show a dropdown of all groups and a user search/select field. Admin can pick a group and a user, then click 'Add to Group' which adds that user's prediction to group_members. Also show a table of all groups with member counts for overview. Add a POST /api/admin endpoint with action 'add_to_group' that accepts {group_id, username}, finds the user's prediction, and inserts into group_members. Verify site admin auth.

tasks.title: Expand simulator to include group stage simulation
tasks.description: The current /simulate page only handles knockout bracket simulation. Expand it to support group stage simulation as well. Add a 'Group Stage' tab/section where the user can set hypothetical group finishing orders (reorder teams in each group, pick advancing 3rd-place teams). The leaderboard sidebar should recalculate live as the user changes group results. When group stage sim is complete, auto-generate the knockout bracket from those hypothetical results and allow the user to continue simulating knockouts. The page should detect which phase the tournament is in: if group stage is still in progress, show group sim first; if knockouts are active, show knockout sim. Add an 'If Current Results Hold' button that auto-fills group positions based on current live ESPN standings (uses fetchGroupStandings from espnSync if available).

tasks.title: Add simulator link to Navbar and make it accessible
tasks.description: Add 'Simulator' to the Navbar navigation links (between Leaderboard and Groups). Ensure the /simulate page is accessible from the main navigation. Currently it may not be linked anywhere visible. Also add a prominent 'What If?' button on the leaderboard page that links to /simulate with the current group pre-selected.

tasks.title: Add percentile rank and bonus points column to leaderboard
tasks.description: Add two things to the leaderboard: (1) Percentile rank — show each user their percentile position (e.g. 'Top 12%') as a small chip or text below their rank number. Calculate as (1 - (rank-1)/totalMembers) * 100, rounded. (2) Bonus points column — add a 'Bonus' column showing total upset bonus points earned (group stage upset bonuses + knockout upset bonuses combined). This helps users see how much of their score came from bold picks vs safe picks. Both should be included in the leaderboard API response and displayed in the table.

tasks.title: Create user profile page at /profile/[username]
tasks.description: Create src/app/profile/[username]/page.tsx. Public page (no auth required to view). Shows: username header, member since date, list of groups they belong to, their group predictions (read-only GroupPrediction cards), their knockout bracket (read-only KnockoutBracket), score summary (group stage score, knockout score, total, bonus points, percentile in each group), stats (perfect groups count, contrarian picks, champion pick). Link to profile from leaderboard usernames (clickable). Add a 'View Profile' link in the Navbar dropdown when logged in for your own profile.

tasks.title: Allow group admins to lock/unlock submissions independently
tasks.description: Add a 'Lock Submissions' toggle to the group settings (visible to group creator). When locked, members of that group cannot modify their predictions even if the tournament lock time hasn't passed yet. Add submissions_locked check to the picks API — when saving, check if any of the user's groups have submissions_locked=1 and if so, reject the save with a message explaining which group locked it. Show a lock icon and 'Submissions locked by group admin' message on the predictions page when applicable. Group admin can toggle lock/unlock anytime via PUT /api/groups. The Everyone group should not be lockable independently (only follows tournament lock time).

tasks.title: Create mini-bracket progression widget with round tabs
tasks.description: Create src/components/bracket/MiniBracket.tsx — a compact bracket progression widget. Instead of showing the full bracket, show tabs for each round transition: 'R32→R16' (shows the 16 winners advancing), 'R16→QF' (shows 8 advancing), 'QF→SF' (4 advancing), 'SF→Final' (2 advancing + champion). Each tab shows a compact grid/list of teams that made it through to that round based on the user's picks. Use small flag + team name chips. Highlight the user's champion pick prominently. This gives a quick overview of 'who do I have going deep?' without needing the full bracket. Use it on: the home page as a summary of the user's picks, the profile page, and as a collapsible sidebar on the knockout predictions page while filling out the bracket. Should also work in read-only mode for viewing others' picks.

tasks.title: Add pick animations and visual feedback
tasks.description: Add satisfying animations when users make picks. GroupPrediction: brief slide animation when reordering teams. Matchup: pulse/highlight animation (300ms) when a team is selected as winner. Champion pick (Final winner): confetti burst or gold shimmer effect. ThirdPlacePicker: chips animate in/out when toggled. Use CSS transitions and keyframes — no heavy animation libraries. Keep animations subtle and fast (200-400ms). Add a reduced-motion media query check to disable animations for users who prefer reduced motion.

tasks.title: Add onboarding guide / tutorial for new users
tasks.description: Create src/components/common/OnboardingGuide.tsx — a step-by-step tutorial overlay that explains the prediction process to new users. Triggered on first visit to /bracket (check localStorage flag). Steps: (1) Welcome — explain the 2026 World Cup format briefly (48 teams, 12 groups of 4, top 2 advance + 8 best 3rd place teams). (2) Group predictions — explain they need to predict the finishing order 1-4 for each group. Show which positions mean 'advance' vs 'eliminated'. (3) Third-place picks — explain that 8 of 12 third-place teams also advance, and they need to pick which 8. Explain this is unique to the 48-team format. (4) Knockout bracket — explain this opens later after group stage ends, they'll pick winners for 31 matches. (5) Scoring overview — brief summary of how points work. Use a modal/dialog with Next/Back/Skip buttons. Show progress dots. Can be re-triggered from a '?' help button in the Navbar. Also add contextual help tooltips on the ThirdPlacePicker explaining '8 of 12 third-place teams advance to the Round of 32 — pick which ones you think will make it!'

tasks.title: Show scoring rules summary at top of predictions pages
tasks.description: Add a collapsible scoring rules panel at the top of both /bracket (group predictions) and /bracket/knockout pages. Create src/components/common/ScoringRulesSummary.tsx — an MUI Accordion or Paper that shows a concise breakdown of how points are earned. For group stage page: show advance correct (+1), exact position (+1), upset bonus (+1 per place above seed if correct), group bonuses (advancement correct +1, perfect order +2). Explain what 'advance' means (1st/2nd auto-advance, 8 of 12 third-place teams also advance). For knockout page: show points per round (3/5/8/13/13/21), upset bonus formula (ranking diff / 5 × multiplier), multipliers per round. Use the group's actual scoring_settings if the user is in a group, otherwise DEFAULT_SCORING. Keep it compact — use a table or icon+text format. Default collapsed on return visits (localStorage), expanded on first visit.

tasks.title: Persist selected group across pages via localStorage
tasks.description: When a user selects a group on any page (leaderboard, simulator, stats, who-picked-whom, compare), persist that selection to localStorage under a key like 'selectedGroupId'. On any page that has a group selector, read the initial value from localStorage instead of defaulting to the first group or 'everyone'. When the user changes the selection, update localStorage. This way navigating between leaderboard, simulator, stats etc. keeps the same group selected. Create a shared hook src/hooks/useSelectedGroup.ts that encapsulates this: returns {selectedGroupId, setSelectedGroupId} with localStorage persistence. Use this hook in all pages that have group selectors.

tasks.title: Hide pages based on tournament phase, admin bypass
tasks.description: Restrict page visibility based on tournament phase. Before group stage starts (before lock_time_groups): hide Stats, Who Picked Whom, Compare, Leaderboard scores (show 'Available once the tournament begins'). Users can only see their own predictions and the predictions page. After group stage starts but before knockout: show group-stage-related pages (leaderboard with group scores, stats, who-picked-whom for groups, compare group predictions). Hide knockout bracket data. After knockout starts (after lock_time_knockout): show everything. Site admins (is_admin=true) bypass all restrictions and can see every page at any time for debugging. Implement as a shared utility src/lib/tournamentPhase.ts with getPhase(tournament): 'pre-tournament' | 'group-stage' | 'knockout' | 'complete'. Use in each restricted page to show/hide content or redirect. Also hide nav links for pages that aren't accessible yet (grey them out with a tooltip showing when they unlock).

tasks.title: Create tournament timeline component on home page
tasks.description: Create src/components/common/TournamentTimeline.tsx — a visual timeline showing the key dates and phases of the tournament. Display on the home page below the countdown. Phases: (1) 'Predictions Open' (now until lock_time_groups) — 'Fill out your group predictions before June 11', (2) 'Group Stage' (June 11-27) — 'Watch matches, track your predictions vs live results', (3) 'Knockout Predictions Open' (June 27-30) — 'Come back to fill out your knockout bracket', (4) 'Knockout Stage' (June 30 - July 19) — 'Watch the bracket unfold'. Highlight the current phase. Show dates for each. Use MUI Stepper or a custom vertical timeline with icons. Make it clear users need to return for the knockout phase.

tasks.title: Add ESPN match page links to live score cards
tasks.description: In src/components/bracket/LiveScores.tsx, make each live score card clickable — link to the ESPN match page at https://www.espn.com/soccer/match/_/gameId/{espnGameId}. The game ID is available from the ESPN scoreboard API response (event.id). Open in a new tab. Add a small external link icon to indicate it's a link out. If the game ID isn't available, fall back to linking to https://www.espn.com/soccer/scoreboard/_/league/fifa.world.

tasks.title: Redesign ThirdPlacePicker as ordered list with full team info
tasks.description: Redesign the ThirdPlacePicker component. Instead of toggleable Chips, show the 12 third-place teams as a vertical list ordered by group (A through L). Each row should display the same info as the GroupPrediction cards: flag, team name, pot seed chip, FIFA ranking, and the group they came from (e.g. 'Group A - 3rd'). Add a checkbox or toggle on each row to select/deselect that team as advancing. Selected teams get a green background (advancing), unselected get a dimmed/red background (eliminated). Keep the 8/12 counter prominently displayed. The list format makes it much clearer which teams are being picked since users can see all the context (ranking, group) rather than just a name chip. Maintain the same onChange(selected: string[]) API so the bracket page doesn't need changes.

tasks.title: Fix knockout bracket page: always show bracket, fix visual updates on pick
tasks.description: Two issues with /bracket/knockout: (1) When knockout bracket hasn't been generated yet, the page shows a blocking message and hides everything. Instead, always show the bracket page structure with an info banner at the top saying 'The knockout bracket will be available after the group stage ends on [date]. Come back then to fill out your picks!' but still let users see the empty bracket layout so they understand what's coming. If the bracket IS generated, show it normally. (2) When users click to pick a winner in a matchup, the bracket should visually update immediately — the winning team should appear in the next round's matchup slot. Verify that the KnockoutBracket component properly propagates picks through the bracket visually (winner of R32-1 appears as teamA or teamB in the corresponding R16 matchup). Debug by checking if the Matchup component receives updated teamA/teamB props when upstream picks change. Test with Nova Act: log in, go to /bracket/knockout, pick a winner in an R32 match, verify the team appears in the R16 slot.

tasks.title: Auto-create prediction when user joins a group without one
tasks.description: When a user tries to join a group (via /join/[code] or the join dialog) and they don't have a prediction yet, automatically create an empty prediction for them instead of showing an error. In the groups API join handler: if no prediction exists for the user, create one with empty group_predictions, empty third_place_picks, empty knockout_picks, and a default bracket_name (e.g. the user's username). Then add that prediction to the group. Also do this in the Everyone group auto-join during registration. This removes the friction of 'you need to create a bracket first' — users can join groups immediately and fill in their picks later.

tasks.title: Add autosave with debounce to predictions pages
tasks.description: Add autosave to both /bracket (group predictions) and /bracket/knockout pages, following the March Madness pattern. Use a 2-second debounce: when picks change, wait 2 seconds of inactivity then auto-save via POST /api/picks. Show a status indicator in the corner: 'Saved ✓' (green), 'Saving...' (yellow spinner), 'Unsaved changes' (orange). Don't autosave if picks are empty (no changes made yet). Don't autosave if locked. Track saved state with a ref comparing current picks JSON to last saved JSON. Auto-create the prediction on first save if one doesn't exist yet (the API should handle upsert). Remove or de-emphasize the manual Save button since autosave handles it — keep it as a fallback but make it less prominent.

tasks.title: Show leaderboard before event with completion status, hide pick details
tasks.description: Before the tournament starts, the leaderboard should be visible but show different info than during the tournament. Show: username, bracket name, and a completion status column. Completion status: for group stage, show 'X/12 groups filled' and 'X/8 third-place picks'. Use a progress bar or checkmarks. Show ✅ if all groups are ordered and 8 third-place teams selected, ⚠️ if partially complete, ❌ if empty. Do NOT show any details about what teams they picked — no scores, no pick breakdowns, no compare access. This lets users see who's in their group and who still needs to fill out their predictions, without revealing anyone's picks before lock time. After lock_time_groups passes, switch to showing actual scores and enable pick visibility. Same pattern for knockout phase: show 'X/31 knockout picks' completion before lock_time_knockout.

tasks.title: Show dates on all tournament timeline phases, not just current
tasks.description: The TournamentTimeline component on the home page currently only shows the date range for the active phase. Update it to show dates for ALL phases: (1) 'Predictions Open' — Now through Jun 10, (2) 'Group Stage' — Jun 11 – Jun 27, (3) 'Knockout Predictions' — Jun 27 – Jun 30, (4) 'Knockout Stage' — Jun 30 – Jul 19. Each phase should display its date range as subtitle text regardless of whether it's the current phase. Future phases should show the dates so users know exactly when they need to come back. Use the tournament's lock_time_groups and lock_time_knockout to derive the dates dynamically rather than hardcoding.

tasks.title: Improve scoring rules display: bullet points and clearer round progression
tasks.description: Improve the ScoringRulesSummary component on the predictions pages. (1) Rewrite the scoring explanation as clear bullet points instead of dense text/tables. Group stage bullets: 'Correct advance/not advance: +1 per team', 'Exact finishing position: +1 per team', 'Upset bonus: +1 for each position above their seed you predicted (only if they finish at or above your prediction)', 'All advancement calls correct in a group: +1 bonus', 'Perfect group order: +2 bonus'. (2) For knockout round points, display the progression as R32: 3 → R16: 5 → QF: 8 → SF: 13 → Final: 21 as the main sequence, with '3rd Place Match: 13' shown separately in parentheses or as a note below, NOT inline as '3→5→8→13→13→21' which makes it look like SF and 3rd place are the same round. Something like 'R32: 3 • R16: 5 • QF: 8 • SF: 13 • Final: 21 (3rd place match: 13)'. (3) Show upset bonus explanation: 'Upset bonus = (FIFA ranking difference ÷ 5) × round multiplier' with the multiplier per round shown.

tasks.title: Fix R32 bracket generation to use FIFA's official matchup mapping
tasks.description: The current knockoutBracket.ts has completely wrong R32 matchups. Replace with FIFA's official 2026 bracket mapping. The 16 R32 matches are: Match 73: 2A vs 2B, Match 74: 1E vs 3rd(A/B/C/D/F), Match 75: 1F vs 2C, Match 76: 1C vs 2F, Match 77: 1I vs 3rd(C/D/F/G/H), Match 78: 2E vs 2I, Match 79: 1A vs 3rd(C/E/F/H/I), Match 80: 1L vs 3rd(E/H/I/J/K), Match 81: 1D vs 3rd(B/E/F/I/J), Match 82: 1G vs 3rd(A/E/H/I/J), Match 83: 2K vs 2L, Match 84: 1H vs 2J, Match 85: 1B vs 3rd(E/F/G/I/J), Match 86: 1J vs 2H, Match 87: 1K vs 3rd(D/E/I/J/L), Match 88: 2D vs 2G. The 3rd-place team assignments depend on which 8 of 12 groups have advancing 3rd-place teams. FIFA published 495 combinations in Annex C of tournament regulations. Implement the lookup table from https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_FIFA_World_Cup_knockout_stage#Combinations_of_matches_in_the_round_of_32 — given the set of 8 advancing groups, look up which specific 3rd-place team faces each group winner (1A, 1B, 1D, 1E, 1G, 1I, 1K, 1L). The R16 feeds are: M89=W74vsW77, M90=W73vsW75, M91=W76vsW78, M92=W79vsW80, M93=W83vsW84, M94=W81vsW82, M95=W86vsW88, M96=W85vsW87. QF: M97=W89vsW90, M98=W93vsW94, M99=W91vsW92, M100=W95vsW96. SF: M101=W97vsW98, M102=W99vsW100. 3rd=L101vsL102. Final=W101vsW102.

tasks.title: Fix 3rd place match and Final to correctly use SF winners/losers
tasks.description: The 3rd place match should show the LOSERS of the two semifinals, and the Final should show the WINNERS. Currently both feed from SF-1 and SF-2 identically. Fix the bracket propagation: when a user picks a SF winner, that team goes to the Final, and the OTHER team (the loser) goes to the 3rd place match. In KnockoutBracket component and bracketUtils: when propagating picks from SF to later rounds, the winner goes to FINAL and the loser goes to 3RD. In the bracket display, clearly label '3rd Place Match' and 'Final' with distinct visual treatment. The Final should be prominently displayed (larger, centered, gold border). The 3rd place match should be smaller/secondary. Also fix getNextMatchupId to return both FINAL (for winner) and 3RD (for loser) from SF matches.

tasks.title: Regenerate knockout bracket in DB with corrected matchups
tasks.description: After fixing the bracket generation code, regenerate the knockout bracket stored in the tournament's results_data in the database. The current bracket has incorrect matchups (teams from same group playing each other, duplicate teams). Call the corrected generateKnockoutBracket() with the existing group stage results and update the DB. Add a 'Regenerate Bracket' button on the admin page that re-runs bracket generation from current group results — useful when the generation code is fixed or group results are corrected.
